description: A full-stack application designed to modernize and automate core hospital administrative functions. By leveraging AI-powered document analysis and a conversational agent, this system addresses key inefficiencies in patient records management and appointment scheduling.
skills: Frontend Development: Next.js, React, React Hook Form, TanStack/React-Table, Shadcn/ui
AI/ML Engineering: LangChain, Hugging Face, Pinecone (Vector Database)
Backend & APIs: Express, Node, Appwrite APIs
Validation & Security: Zod, TypeScript, Appwrite Auth
Styling: Tailwind CSS, CSS
features: Full-Stack Development: Developed a full-stack healthcare application using Next.js and TypeScript to streamline the analysis and summarization of medical documents.
AI Engineering: Engineered an AI-powered data processing pipeline by integrating LangChain and Hugging Face for deep text analysis and conversational appointment booking.
RAG & Semantic Search: Implemented a semantic search engine with Pinecone vector database to enable fast, intelligent retrieval of patient records.
UI/UX Design: Built a modern, responsive user interface with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn/ui, ensuring a seamless and accessible experience.
Data Integrity: Enforced data integrity and security by managing complex form state and validation using React Hook Form and Zod.
Performance Optimization: Optimized data visualization for large datasets using TanStack/React-Table, improving usability and workflow efficiency.

description: A React blog application providing a dynamic platform for content sharing, incorporating enhancements for SEO, analytics, and AI-assisted writing.
skills: Frontend Development: React, React Router Dom, Sass/SCSS
Backend Development: Node.js, Express.js
Database: MySQL (MySQL2 Driver)
Auth & Security: Bcrypt, JSON Web Token (JWT), Cookie Parser
AI Integration: OpenAI API
Testing: React Testing Library, Jest, Axios
features: System Architecture: Engineered a full-stack blog application using React and Node.js/Express.js with a MySQL database for structured data management.
Secure Authentication: Developed a secure user authentication system utilizing Bcrypt for hashing and JWT for a stateless authentication flow.
Content Management: Implemented a powerful content creation workflow using React-Quill, allowing users to format posts and embed images.
AI Integration: Integrated an AI-powered content assistant using the OpenAI API to provide users with AI-generated titles and summaries.
Dynamic UI: Built a dynamic frontend where blog posts were fetched with Axios and displayed with a clean, responsive UI.
Quality Assurance: Ensured the application's reliability by implementing component and integration tests with React Testing Library.

description: A high-performance coding platform for practicing algorithms and data structures. This project features a custom-integrated testing and performance auditing suite to ensure enterprise-grade speed and reliability.
skills: Frontend Development: Next.js, React, TypeScript
Automated Testing: Playwright (E2E), Jest, React Testing Library (Unit/Integration)
Performance Auditing: Google Lighthouse, Web Vitals, Performance Budgets
State Management: Recoil
Cloud Services: Firebase (Auth, Firestore), React Firebase Hooks
Code Editor: CodeMirror (@uiw/react-codemirror), VS Code Theme
UI/Styling: Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, Autoprefixer
features: Full-Stack Engineering: Engineered a complete, full-stack coding platform using Next.js and TypeScript for a seamless and type-safe environment.
Automated Quality Gates: Integrated Playwright and Google Lighthouse to automate performance auditing, ensuring the platform maintains high Core Web Vitals scores.
Testing Infrastructure: Implemented a comprehensive testing suite using Jest and React Testing Library to verify component interactions and prevent regressions.
Interactive Editor: Developed a custom, interactive code editor by integrating CodeMirror with syntax highlighting and a VS Code theme.
Backend Integration: Implemented a secure and scalable backend powered by Firebase, handling authentication and problem data storage.
Performance Optimization: Leveraged Playwright to simulate real user journeys while simultaneously running Lighthouse audits to identify rendering bottlenecks.

description: A comprehensive ticket booking dashboard designed to streamline the process of purchasing tickets and visualizing event data.
skills: Frontend Development: React, React Router Dom
Backend Development: Express.js, http-proxy-middleware
Database & ODM: MongoDB, Mongoose
UI Framework: Material-UI (@mui/material, @mui/x-data-grid)
Data Visualization: Recharts, React Circular Progressbar
Auth & Security: JSON Web Token (JWT), Bcrypt
features: Dashboard Architecture: Engineered and deployed a full-stack web application using React and Express.js for secure user management.
API Development: Developed a secure backend API with Express.js and Mongoose to interact with a MongoDB database.
Professional UI: Built a responsive user interface using Material-UI for a consistent design system and custom CSS for branding.
Data Analytics: Integrated data visualization components using Recharts to present KPIs and analytics in an intuitive format.
Navigation Strategy: Managed application navigation using React Router Dom to create a multi-page SPA experience.

description: A full-featured hotel management platform facilitating search, comparison, and reservations with integrated payment processing.
skills: Frontend Development: React, Vite, React Router Dom
State Management: React Hook Form, TanStack Query (v5)
Backend Development: Express.js, Express-Validator
Payments & Storage: Stripe API, Multer, Cloudinary
Auth & Security: JWT, Bcryptjs, Cookie-Parser
Database & ODM: MongoDB, Mongoose
features: Full-Stack Development: Developed a complete hotel management platform using a Vite-powered React frontend and a robust Express.js backend.
Security Protocols: Established a secure user and staff authentication system by implementing JWT and bcryptjs for password hashing.
Database Architecture: Managed a MongoDB database with Mongoose, creating schemas for rooms, reservations, and staff.
Payment Gateway: Integrated a secure payment gateway using Stripe to handle all reservation payments and checkouts.
Data Orchestration: Architected the data-fetching layer using TanStack Query, leveraging hooks for caching and background synchronization.
Media Management: Enabled file uploads for room images and user profiles by configuring Multer and Cloudinary storage.

description: A cross-platform mobile delivery application built with React Native, featuring real-time tracking and AWS integration.
skills: Mobile Development: React Native, Expo, Webpack
Cloud Infrastructure: AWS Amplify, Amazon Cognito
Maps & Geolocation: React Native Maps, Maps Directions API
Navigation: React Navigation (Stack, Bottom Tabs)
Animations: React Native Reanimated, Gesture Handler
UI Components: Ant Design (mobile), Gorhom Bottom Sheet
features: Mobile Engineering: Engineered a full-stack, cross-platform mobile application for a rideshare service using React Native and Expo.
Cloud Infrastructure: Implemented a secure and scalable user authentication system using AWS Amplify and Amazon Cognito.
Geolocation Services: Integrated advanced geolocation and mapping features using React Native Maps to display real-time driver locations.
UX Implementation: Designed a smooth user interface with fluid, gesture-based animations using React Native Reanimated.
Navigation Architecture: Architected the app's navigation using React Navigation, implementing a multi-stack system with bottom tabs.
Data Persistence: Managed client-side data persistence for user preferences and tokens using Async Storage.

description: A specialized recurring billing platform integrated with Stripe for managing professional subscription services.
skills: Frontend Development: React, Vite, React Router Dom
Backend Development: Node.js, Express.js
Authentication: Firebase Auth, Firebase Admin
Payments: Stripe Subscriptions API
UI/UX: Headless UI, Heroicons
Testing: React Testing Library, Jest
features: Platform Development: Developed and deployed a complete subscription platform with a modern React frontend and Express.js backend.
User Authorization: Engineered a secure authentication system using Firebase, managing tiered content roles with Firebase Admin.
Recurring Billing: Implemented a secure payment gateway by integrating Stripe to handle subscription plans and webhook events.
Accessible Design: Crafted a professional and accessible user interface using unstyled components from Headless UI.
Workflow Efficiency: Used a fast development workflow by leveraging Nodemon and handling date logic with Moment.js.
Reliability: Ensured application quality by writing unit and integration tests for critical checkout and login flows.

description: A MERN stack social media platform facilitating real-time communication and content sharing among users.
skills: Full-Stack Development: MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
Real-Time Communication: WebSockets (Socket.io), Event-Driven Architecture
Performance & Caching: Redis, Distributed Caching, Query Optimization
Security: Helmet, Bcrypt, Morgan (Logging)
File Handling: Multer (Multipart/form-data), Cloudinary
UI Components: Material-UI Icons, Timeago.js
Database & ODM: MongoDB, Mongoose
features: Real-Time Interaction: Orchestrated real-time features including instant messaging and live notifications using WebSockets (Socket.io) for bi-directional communication.
Distributed Caching: Integrated Redis to cache frequently accessed user profiles and feed data, significantly reducing database load and improving API response times.
MERN Stack Engineering: Engineered a scalable full-stack social media application using the MERN stack with a secure, event-driven Express.js API.
Backend Security: Implemented a hardened backend using Helmet middleware and Bcrypt hashing to ensure enterprise-grade data protection.
API Implementation: Developed a robust RESTful API with optimized Mongoose queries and Multer integration for efficient multi-part image uploads.
UX Implementation: Built a highly responsive user interface with React and React Router Dom, ensuring a seamless single-page application (SPA) experience.
